text:
Just two days after announcing his retirement from diving following his silver medal win at the2024 Summer Olympic Gamesin Paris, five-time Olympic medalist Tom Daley stars in a public-service announcement fromMalibuwarning about the dangers of mixingalcoholand water.

The Pernod Ricard brand’s “Don’t Drink and Dive” campaign, by agencyWieden+Kennedy London, centers around a charming film set to Rupert Holmes’ “Escape (The Piña Colada Song).”

Strolling poolside holding the classic rum drink, Daley steps onto a diving board and dramatically tosses aside his Malibu robe. But when Daley looks down at the water, the cheerful music stops as he reads the statistic “1 in 4 U.K.

Samantha Nelson is a freelance writer for Adweek.

title: Malibu And Tom Daley Warn Swimmers: 'Don't Drink and Dive'
description: After announcing his retirement from diving, Olympic medalist Tom Daley stars in Malibu’s PSA about the dangers of mixing alcohol and water.
